key_outputs.decision: PIVOT to static fixed-weight sleeve after DM failed; human selected Diversified 40/40/20 SPY/AGG/GLD
key_outputs.validation_PASS: trade-based sim (real tax/turnover): Sharpe 0.90 / OOS 1.09, maxDD 21.1% / OOS 18.2%, CAGR 8.2%; 11 trades in 18y, 0.2x turnover, 100% long-term gains (~13% drag)
key_outputs.beats: Dual Momentum (0.41/34%), SPY (0.68/47%), 60/40 (0.77/30%) on risk-adjusted + after-tax; wins/ties every regime incl COVID +2.8% (DM -24.7%)
key_outputs.gates: PASS G1-G7 (sensitivity flat: Sharpe 0.88-0.99 across weights x band; MC median Sharpe 0.92, p5 CAGR +4.8%)
key_outputs.implementation: StaticAllocator (selection.mode static_allocation), partial avg-cost trims/adds in EtfRiskManager, _rebalance_static loop path, simulate_static harness; default mode stays rotation (off)

assumptions: default 40/40/20 SPY/AGG/GLD, quarterly clock, 5% drift band
live deployable via Alpaca paper; momentum modes remain off
open_issues: Stage 5: wire to Alpaca paper, monitoring, runbook, paper acceptance criteria
IEF variant edged slightly better than AGG - optional future tweak, not blocking
handoff.next_focus: Stage 5: paper deployment of static_allocation on Alpaca paper + monitoring + runbook + acceptance criteria.

correctness.reasoning: Static allocator + partial add/trim + trade-based sim unit-tested (261 green); validation numbers reproduced via the same realistic cost/tax machinery, not the returns approximation.

methodological_rigor.reasoning: Same harness, real tax/turnover, IS/OOS, 4 regimes, MC, weight x band sensitivity; honest about the favorable OOS window.

robustness.reasoning: Flat sensitivity across weights and bands; wins every regime; MC p5 CAGR positive - the opposite of DM's fragility.

safety_compliance.reasoning: Default mode unchanged (off); tripwire/clock/PDT/reconcile preserved; partial trims never misstate basis (avg-cost, realized accrued).

simplicity.reasoning: The whole point - a 3-line weight map beats every active design; minimal new live surface (one allocator + two ledger methods + one loop path).

clarity.reasoning: Report addendum quantifies the PASS vs every alternative; ADR-007 records the pivot and the partial-position design.

issues_found: AGG vs IEF is a minor open optimization
suggested_revisions: Proceed to Stage 5 paper deploy of static_allocation
